description: CyclicFlow has stepA -> stepB -> stepA (back-edge). UnreachableFlow's middle step 'orphan' is skipped by entry's next=finish.

phase9Findings.expectedMessageFragment: CyclicFlow has a cycle: stepA → stepB → stepA
step 'orphan' is not reachable from the entry step

notes: STEP_CYCLE is Sev-1 so verdict is BLOCKED. STEP_UNREACHABLE alone would be Sev-2 (not blocking).
